sys_ui_page.html:
var pMap = { 'ITSM':'x_snc_airop.run_itsm','ITOM':'x_snc_airop.run_itom', 'CMDB':'x_snc_airop.run_cmdb','HRSD':'x_snc_airop.run_hrsd', 'CSM':'x_snc_airop.run_csm','FIELD_SERVICE':'x_snc_airop.run_field_service', 'AIOPS':'x_snc_airop.module.AIOPS.enabled','GRC':'x_snc_airop.run_grc', 'SPM':'x_snc_airop.run_spm','PLATFORM':'x_snc_airop.run_platform', 'VIRTUAL_AGENT':'x_snc_airop.run_virtual_agent', 'DEX':'x_snc_airop.module.DEX.enabled', 'SECOPS':'x_snc_airop.module.SECOPS.enabled', 'HS':'x_snc_airop.module.HS.enabled', 'OTSM':'x_snc_airop.module.OTSM.enabled', 'CREATOR':'x_snc_airop.module.CREATOR.enabled', 'SPO':'x_snc_airop.module.SPO.enabled', 'TPRM':'x_snc_airop.module.TPRM.enabled', 'LSD':'x_snc_airop.module.LSD.enabled', 'WSD':'x_snc_airop.module.WSD.enabled', 'HAM':'x_snc_airop.module.HAM.enabled', 'SAM':'x_snc_airop.module.SAM.enabled' }; var ena = []; for (var mk in pMap) { if (gs.getProperty(pMap[mk], 'false') === 'true') ena.push(mk); } jvar_modules = ena.length > 0 ? ena.join(', ') : 'No modules enabled'; var lastGr = new GlideRecord('x_snc_airop_assessment_run'); lastGr.addQuery('status', 'complete'); lastGr.orderByDesc('run_date'); lastGr.setLimit(1); lastGr.query(); jvar_last_run = lastGr.next() ? lastGr.getValue('name') + ' (' + lastGr.getValue('run_date') + ')' : 'No completed runs yet'; var svcUser = 'svc.airop'; var svcPass = gs.getProperty('x_snc_airop.svc_password', ''); jvar_auth = GlideStringUtil.base64Encode(svcUser + ':' + svcPass);

ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform

Automated assessment of AI activation readiness across ServiceNow modules

Modules to be scanned: ${jvar_modules}

Last completed run: ${jvar_last_run}

Note: Only one assessment can run at a time. Once started, you will not be able to trigger another scan until this one completes. Depending on the number of modules enabled, the assessment may take several minutes to finish. You will be redirected to the run record automatically - refresh it to see live status updates.

Assessment History Check Catalog Configuration
sys_ui_page.name: run_assessment
